# Pearl River Design
> Web design agency for contractors and local businesses in Rockland County, NY

## About
Pearl River Design builds fast, professional websites for local contractors — plumbers, roofers, electricians, landscapers, HVAC, and more. Sites are live in 1–2 business days for a flat $1,000 fee with no monthly charges.

## Services
- Contractor websites: $1,000 flat, one time. No monthly fees. No contracts.
- Turnaround: live in 1–2 business days
- Includes: custom design, Google-optimized, mobile-ready, contact form
- Service areas: Pearl River, Suffern, Nyack, Nanuet, Spring Valley, Rockland County, NY

## Who We Serve
Local service businesses without a website: plumbers, roofers, electricians, HVAC contractors, landscapers, concrete contractors, fencing contractors, painters, tree service companies

## Contact
- Email: jackson@pearlriverdesign.dev
- Phone: (914) 354-8647
- Address: Pearl River, NY 10965

## Get Started
Visit https://pearlriverdesign.dev/onboarding to fill out the intake form.
